title: Cassia senna (Senna)
benefits_text: Cassia senna, also known as Senna, is a plant with a wide range of health benefits. It has long been used as a natural laxative to alleviate constipation and promote bowel regularity, as well as to cleanse the colon and soothe irritable bowel syndrome. Additionally, senna can reduce inflammation, treat hemorrhoids, prevent cancer growth, and boost the immune system. It can also aid in weight loss, regulate the menstrual cycle, and relieve menstrual pain. Furthermore, senna can improve skin health, treat respiratory conditions, reduce fever, alleviate earaches, treat eye infections, kill intestinal parasites, improve oral health, increase energy levels, and even reduce the risk of developing fevers. However, it is important to note that senna should be used with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional, as it can cause side effects such as diarrhea, cramps, and dependency.
